'''tangïfbïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okka|okka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okka|okka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| tangïfbïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tængïfbïfth || tængïfbïfj || tængïfbïfsh || tængïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tangïfngïfbïfth || tangïfngïfbïfj || tangïfngïfbïfsh || tangïfngïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tangïfbïfth || tangïfbïfj || tangïfbïfsh || tangïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tangïffbïffth || tangïffbïffj || tangïffbïffsh || tangïffbïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tangïfbïfïf || tangïfbïfïf || tangïfbïfïf || tangïfbïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || tangïfbïfth || tangïfbïfj || tangïfbïfsh || tangïfbïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tangïfbïfïfl || tangïfbïfïfl || tangïfbïfïfl || tangïfbïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tangïfbïfïfïf || tangïfbïfïfïf || tangïfbïfïfïf || tangïfbïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || tangïfbïfïfn || tangïfbïfïfn || tangïfbïfïfn || tangïfbïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tangïfbïfïforo || tangïfbïfïforo || tangïfbïfïforo || tangïfbïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
